task.title: Add Control Room settings cog for config mapping
task.summary: Add a header-right settings cog to the local web Control Room that opens a Settings page/panel mapping `.codewiki/config.json` options into grouped, source-backed rows without restoring Settings to the left rail.

goal.outcome: Users can inspect current CodeWiki config options from a header cog in the web Control Room while primary navigation remains Status/Product/System/Board/Graph.
acceptance: Control Room header includes a settings cog or equivalent top-right affordance.
Activating settings opens an in-app Settings page/panel without adding Settings to the left rail.
Settings read model maps `.codewiki/config.json` into grouped rows showing option path, current value, category/purpose, source path, and editability cue.
Settings covers major config areas: project identity/roots, roadmap retention, generated files/views, lint, gateway, runtime/rebuild, agency, and GC/archival when configured.
Settings state is derived from `.codewiki/config.json` and does not create hidden UI-only truth or unsafe writes.
Control Room smoke tests assert header cog/settings API/page behavior and left rail remains simplified.
non_goals: Do not restore Settings as a left-rail section.
Do not implement broad config editing or direct JSON mutation in this slice.
Do not add hosted/shared settings storage.

summary: Implemented TASK-069 Control Room settings cog and `.codewiki/config.json` option mapping UI.

evidence: Control Room smoke fixture includes representative config categories and asserts settings model, header cog, API response, and simplified nav.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Added settings interfaces/model/API route, header cog, settings panel renderer, CSS, and tests.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Control Room smoke fixture includes representative config categories and asserts settings model, header cog, API response, and simplified nav.
code_change_evidence: Added settings interfaces/model/API route, header cog, settings panel renderer, CSS, and tests.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Control Room header includes a settings cog or equivalent top-right affordance.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: HTML now includes `#settingsButton` in header actions; smoke asserts `id="settingsButton"`.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Activating settings opens an in-app Settings page/panel without adding Settings to the left rail.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: JS `toggleSettings` opens `#settingsPanel`; HTML left rail remains Status/Product/System/Board/Graph and smoke asserts no `data-view="settings"`.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Settings read model maps `.codewiki/config.json` into grouped rows showing option path, value, category/purpose, source path, and editability cue.

acceptance_mapping.evidence: Grouping covers project, paths, roadmap retention, generated files, lint, gateway, runtime, rebuild, agency, GC, and other; smoke asserts gateway and agency rows.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Settings state is derived from `.codewiki/config.json` and does not create hidden UI-only truth or unsafe writes.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Settings model reads `project.config` and panel renders read-only rows with editability labels; no write endpoint added.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Control Room smoke tests assert header cog/settings API/page behavior and left rail remains simplified.

closure_brief.user_intent: Add Settings to the local web Control Room as a header-right cog that maps `.codewiki/config.json` options.
implemented_changes: Added header settings cog and in-app Settings panel.
Added `/api/settings` and a grouped config option read model.
Mapped config paths, current values, purposes, source path, and editability cues.
Kept Settings out of the left rail so primary navigation remains Status/Product/System/Board/Graph.
acceptance_evidence: All TASK-069 acceptance criteria mapped to implementation evidence in this build.
non_goals_preserved: No broad config editing or direct JSON mutation.
remaining_risks: Future work may add safe editing through explicit API-backed actions.

risks: Settings is read-only in this slice; safe config editing remains future work.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-069 Add Control Room settings cog for config mapping implementation evidence
commit.body:
Implemented TASK-069 Control Room settings cog and `.codewiki/config.json` option mapping UI.

Checks: npx tsc --noEmit, node scripts/check-architecture.mjs, node tests/smoke/control-room.test.mjs, npm test
Validation: .codewiki/validation/2026-05-12-implementation-pass-task-069.json
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
